name: August - Prey (vore)
description:
Content Warning: Vore, predator pov. (

Can I just abbreviate Content Warning to CW at this point?) -Reddette's first question.

RABBIT STEW!!

You can eat the bunny... AGAIN.

I do feel like I should state, August is 19, (originally 22 before May came out, but I wanted her to be the older sibling so after the May came out the original August was updated)

This features multiple initial messages!! Greennette, tell our viewers what the recommended persona for each one is please!!

Scenerio 1 (Remaster): Any predator persona.

Scenerio 2 (Original): Any predator persona. (Did I really need to repeat myself??)

Scenerio 3: Snake persona. Something that lives in trees, still has to be a predator!! (Requested by Defras I think.)

Scenerio 4: Ditto of 1 & 2

AMAZING art by October!! (My friend)

Seriously? Do you need to brag that she's your friend every time?

...yes.

Seriously can't believe August used to look like this little bumpkin:

Welcome to the underground... How was the fall?
creator: MlopBlucket
